CREATE TABLE test_block (id UInt64, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT blockNumber() FROM (SELECT * FROM test_block) SETTINGS max_block_size = 2;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY num;
SELECT blockNumber() FROM (SELECT * FROM test_numbers LIMIT 5) SETTINGS max_block_size = 3;
SELECT blockNumber() FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_block WHERE id >= 2) SETTINGS max_block_size = 4;
SELECT blockNumber() FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_block) SETTINGS max_block_size = 1;
SELECT blockNumber() FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT num FROM test_numbers WHERE num < 5) subquery) SETTINGS max_block_size = 5;
SELECT blockNumber() FROM (SELECT id FROM test_block JOIN test_numbers ON test_block.id = test_numbers.num) SETTINGS max_block_size = 2;
SELECT blockNumber() FROM (SELECT count(*) FROM test_block GROUP BY value) SETTINGS max_block_size = 10;
SELECT blockNumber() FROM (SELECT value FROM test_block UNION ALL SELECT value FROM test_block) SETTINGS max_block_size = 10;
SELECT blockNumber() FROM (SELECT id FROM test_block WHERE id IN (SELECT num FROM test_numbers WHERE num > 5)) SETTINGS max_block_size = 3;
